R0193.title: Blockchain Supply Chain Attack
R0193.definition: Attackers compromise blockchain development tools, SDKs, wallet plugins and other supply chain components to inject malicious code, affecting numerous downstream projects and users.

references.title: 2025 Web3 Security Annual Report: Supply Chain Attacks Become the Largest Threat
Blockchain Security: Preventing Threats Before They Strike

R0193.description: Attackers compromise blockchain development tools, SDKs, wallet plugins and other supply chain components to inject malicious code, affecting numerous downstream projects and users.
R0193.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
